# Policy Hub

An underwriting workbench for insurance carriers, brokers, and MGAs. Policy
Hub manages the full policy lifecycle — quoting, premium calculation, and
policy issuance — on top of ACORD standard forms, so data exchanged with
partner carriers stays in a common, auditable format.

Actuarial teams get a NAIC-aligned audit trail for every pricing decision,
which supports state Department of Insurance filings and Solvency II capital
reporting for reinsurance treaties. Claims adjusters can review deductible
and coverage details alongside bordereau reports generated for reinsurance
partners, and underwriters can trace every rate change back to its actuarial
model version.

## Installation

npm install
npm run dev
